subject: Refactor the system into a flow-driven orchestrator.
summary: Architecture baseline accepted for: Refactor the system into a flow-driven orchestrator.

architecture: Use the coordinator-owned task brief as the compact handoff contract for downstream roles.
Keep support work isolated through explorer and scout when extra repository or external context is needed.
Treat Copilot VS Code custom agents as the primary execution surface.
Keep Codex compatible through the same role, prompt, and flow contracts.
Keep Python orchestration as a validation and test harness rather than the main runtime.
non_functional_requirements: Native handoffs must stay readable and role-bounded.
Flow and artifact behavior must remain deterministic in the validation harness.

work_items.description: Refactor the system into a flow-driven orchestrator.
Keep schemas, prompts, flow validation, and handoffs aligned.
